name: Use compound components (React composition)
description: Structure complex components as compound components with shared context; subcomponents read shared state via context (not prop drilling).

metadata.intent: Design component APIs with compound components + shared context, avoiding monolithic render-prop interfaces

must_not: Monolithic component with many renderX props for structural composition
conventions: Keep context typed; subcomponents should throw if used outside provider.

steps.description: List shared state/actions that all subcomponents need; decide provider boundary.
Export as an object of subcomponents: `{ Provider, Frame, Header, Input, Footer, Submit, ... }` to encourage composition.
No hidden conditionals inside the compound component for modes; let variants compose the pieces.
